summary: Iter 31 — E2E validation of 5 new features (COOPER/EXPERT spaces, admin buyers tab, taxonomy CRUD, vendor view/edit/PDF + photo upload). Backend: 11/11 pytest pass (team overview 401/200/403, buyers list+credits+suspend with restore, taxonomy public GETs + auth-gated POST/DELETE for categories and TVA rates, vendor upload PNG×3 then 4th=400 then GIF=400, PDF Content-Type=application/pdf). Frontend: all critical selectors present and functional — /espace-cooper renders cooper-space-page with 4 KPIs (orders/products/pending/lowstock) + cooper-recent-orders; /espace-expert accessible as COOPER (staff); role-space-denied shows without auth. Superadmin buyers tab: buyer-credits-{id} editable, save toast success, restored to 250. Taxonomy tab: category 'Test QA' add→list→delete OK, TVA 13.5 add→delete OK (testids are taxonomy-new-rate-*, taxonomy-add-rate-btn, taxonomy-rates-delete-* — not -tva-*, but functionally correct). Vendor space: view-product-{id} opens product-view-modal with download-product-sheet-btn; edit-product-{id} on approved product opens prefilled form with 'Modifier :' title; new-product form has product-photos-section + product-photo-add-btn + file input accept='image/png,image/jpeg'; category select has 8 options, TVA select has 6 options (both hydrated from /api/taxonomy). Non-regression: superadmin-tab-dashboard/users/roles all present. DB state clean after run.

issues: Radix DialogContent warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' — accessibility a11y minor. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to silence.

action_items: (Optional) Rename TVA testids from taxonomy-new-rate-* to taxonomy-new-tva-* to align with review-request spec (currently .../new-rate-value, .../new-rate-label, .../add-rate-btn, .../rates-delete-{id}). Functionality is correct; only naming diverges.
(Minor a11y) Add DialogDescription to VendorProductFormModal and VendorProductViewModal to silence Radix warning.
(WS noise) WebSocket /ws/notifications closes 1006 on superadmin dashboard — non-blocking but should investigate; likely proxy/upgrade path.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_team_space.py require_staff (line 31): STAFF_ROLES set is case-sensitive; ok as-is since seed writes uppercase, but consider normalizing user.role via .upper() to defend against case drift.

routes_taxonomy.py add_category: 409 on duplicate is good; consider trimming to 60 chars and rejecting empty regex-slug (e.g., label made entirely of punctuation → value='' would still be inserted with empty value). Add `if not value: raise 400`.
TaxonomyTab uses testId prop 'taxonomy-rates' which yields taxonomy-rates-delete-{id}; review request expected 'taxonomy-tva-*'. Align naming.
BuyersTab save flow: no debounce/optimistic rollback on 4xx — a failing PATCH would leave the input showing an unsaved value. Add try/catch with revert.

VendorProductFormModal (edit mode): backend ProductUpdate only accepts name/description/price_ht/stock_quantity/min_order_quantity/available_zones/dlc_days — form still displays category/TVA/brand/EAN etc. as editable; consider disabling those fields in edit mode to avoid user confusion (they silently don't save).
test_credentials: admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025! ; cooper-test@kdmarche.fr / NmgHyl4STePu ; acheteur-pro@kdmarche.fr / Demo2026! ; vendor space /espace-vendeur uses vendor-demo-pro (no login).
seed_data_creation: Temporary during tests: category 'Test QA', TVA rate 13.5 'Test QA', vendor images ×3 on vp-damoiseau-rhum-blanc, buyer credits→999 then→suspend true. ALL cleaned/restored: extra_cats=0, extra_tvas=0, vp images=[], no leftover files under uploads/products/vp-damoiseau-*, buyer credits=250 suspended=false role=buyer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 iter31 features are green. Login form button uses type=submit (label is 'Se connecter' FR / 'Sign in' EN). Superadmin route is /superadmin. Vendor space /espace-vendeur is unauth-friendly (uses vendor-demo-pro implicit). Category/TVA selects in vendor form are native <select> (not Radix) — 8 cats + 6 tvas hydrated from /api/taxonomy on modal open. TVA testids diverge from review-request naming: use taxonomy-new-rate-value / taxonomy-add-rate-btn / taxonomy-rates-delete-{id} instead of *-tva-*.
